series_metadata.series_description: Files contains correspondence relative to hearing requests, transcripts, hearing officer recommendation, fire marshal final orders and appeals to common pleas court.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain computer data until record are no longer created in this agency, then destroy by erasure ; Microform: Transfer master microfilm to Archives. Retain diazo copy in operating area. Updated copy to be used in conjunction with computer data when operationally necessary ; Paper: Retain hard copy of hearing files and/or subsequent appeals in operating area until case is closed, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy hard copy records, Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Archives ; Paper: Wastepaper
